lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa chhant mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Chhant, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਧਿਆਏ ਸਭਿ ਫਲ ਪਾਏ ਧਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਤੇ ਬਡਭਾਗੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: raam dhiaae sabh fal paae dhan dhan te baddabhaageea |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, all fruits and rewards are obtained. They are blessed, blessed and very fortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਉਧਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਰਾਮ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: se udhare jin raam dhiaae |
lines.english: They alone are saved, who meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੇ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: jatan maaeaa ke kaam na aae |
lines.english: Working for Maya is useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਸਾਧੂ ਲਗਿ ਤਰਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: taj maan moh bikaar saadhoo lag trau tin kai paae |
lines.english: I have renounced pride, emotional attachment, wickedness and corruption; attached to the Holy, I am carried across at their feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਿ ਜਾਗੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਏਕ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: satasang jaage naam laage ek siau liv laageea |
lines.english: They are awake and aware in the True Congregation; attached to the Naam, they are lovingly attuned to the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬਡਭਾਗਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak saran suaamee baddabhaag darasan paae |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I have come to the Sanctuary of my Lord and Master; by great good fortune, I obtain the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਜੀਵਹ ਹਰਿ ਅਮਿਉ ਪੀਵਹ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣਾ ਭਾਗਏ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaae jeevah har amiau peevah janam maranaa bhaage |
lines.english: Singing His Praises they live, drinking in the Lord's Nectar; the cycle of birth and death is over for them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਨਿਤ ਭਜਹ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: mil saadhoo nit bhajah naaraaein |
lines.english: The Holy meet together, and continually vibrate and meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਕਿ ਰਸਕਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: rasak rasak suaamee gun gaaein |
lines.english: With love and excitement, they sing the Glorious Praises of their Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗਏ ॥
lines.translit: satasang paaeeai har dhiaaeeai bahurr dookh na laage |
lines.english: Finding the True Congregation and meditating on the Lord, one is never again afflicted with pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਦਾਤੇ ਪੁਰਖ ਬਿਧਾਤੇ ਸੰਤ ਸੇਵ ਕਮਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: kar deaa daate purakh bidhaate sant sev kamaaein |
lines.english: By the Grace of the Great Giver, the Architect of Destiny, we work to serve the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨ ਧੂਰਿ ਬਾਂਛਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਣ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak jan dhoor baanchheh har daras sehaj samaaein |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I long for the dust of the feet of the humble; I am intuitively absorbed in the Blessed Vision of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਭਜਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਸਫਲ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nit bhajahu suaamee antarajaamee safal janam sabaaeaa |
lines.english: Vibrating and meditating continuously on our Lord and Master, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, one's life becomes totally fruitful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਜੰਤ ਭਜਹੁ ਗੋਪਾਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: sagale jant bhajahu gopaalai |
lines.english: All beings vibrate and meditate on the Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮ ਪੂਰਨ ਘਾਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam pooran ghaalai |
lines.english: This brings the merits of chanting and meditation, austere self-discipline and perfect service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਗਾਈਐ ਨਿਤ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਸੋਈ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gobid gaaeeai nit dhiaaeeai paravaan soee aaeaa |
lines.english: Those who sing and meditate continually on the Lord of the Universe - their coming into the world is blessed and approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪ ਤਾਪ ਸੰਜਮ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਚਾਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: jap taap sanjam har har niranjan gobind dhan sang chaalai |
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord, Har, Har, is meditation and chanting, and austere self-discipline; only the Wealth of the Lord of the Universe shall go along with you in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਦੀਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਬਾਧਉ ਪਾਲੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak kar deaa deejai har ratan baadhau paalai |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, please grant Your Grace, O Lord, and bless me with the Jewel, that I may carry it in my pocket. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੁਖਹਗਾਮੀ ਇਛ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਪੁੰਨੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: prabh mile suaamee sukhahagaamee ichh man kee puneea |
lines.english: God, my Lord and Master, the Bringer of peace, has met me, and the desires of my mind are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮਿਲੇ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa mile paramaanandaa |
lines.english: granting His Grace, He bestows supreme ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਗਲਚਾਰ ਚੋਜ ਆਨੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: mangalachaar choj aanandaa |
lines.english: His Wondrous and Amazing Plays are blissful

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਜੀ ਬਧਾਈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਮਾਈ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਦੂਖਿ ਨ ਰੁੰਨੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: bajee badhaaee sahaje samaaee bahurr dookh na runeea |
lines.english: Congratulations pour in; I am intuitively absorbed in the Lord. I shall never again cry out in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਏ ਸੁਖ ਦਿਖਾਏ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਮੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: le kantth laae sukh dikhaae bikaar binase mandaa |
lines.english: He hugs me close in His Embrace, and blesses me with peace; the evil of sin and corruption is gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦਾ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak mile suaamee purakh paramaanandaa |4|1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I have met my Lord and Master, the Primal Lord, the Embodiment of Bliss. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜੇ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਮੂਸੇ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਕੀ ਧੁਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarre kee vaar mahalaa 4 moose kee vaar kee dhunee |
lines.english: Vaar Of Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl, Sung To The Tune Of The Ballad Of Musa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਖੁ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam nidhaan har guramat rakh ur dhaar |
lines.english: Follow the Guru's Teachings, and enshrine the Treasure of the Lord's Name within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸਨ ਦਾਸਾ ਹੋਇ ਰਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: daasan daasaa hoe rahu haumai bikhiaa maar |
lines.english: Become the slave of the Lord's slaves, and conquer egotism and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਜੀਤਿਆ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath jeetiaa kade na aavai haar |
lines.english: You shall win this treasure of life; you shall never lose.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਸਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan vaddabhaagee naanakaa jin guramat har ras saar |1|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed and very fortunate are those, O Nanak, who savor the Sublime Essence of the Lord through the Guru's Teachings. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਤਾਂ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: govid govid guramat dhiaaeeai taan daragah paaeeai maan |
lines.english: Meditating on Govind, Govind, the Lord of the Universe, through the Guru's Teachings, you shall be honored in the Court of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: govind govid govid har govid gunee nidhaan |
lines.english: Govind, Govind, Govind - the Lord God, the Lord of the Universe is the Treasure of Virtue.
